_comment: Bad case 11 — REQUEST_FLIGHT_FOLLOWING in EU region. EU VFR has no flight-following service, so the intent_frequency rule has allowed=[] and a region-specific rejection. Guards verifies that the engine never silently answers with 'squawk 4527' outside the US. Part B confirms that normal Tower traffic on the same airport still works.
name: Bad case 11 — EU flight following not available (LSZG)

say.note: Part A — Pilot asks for flight following in EU (not an offered service)
say.text: Grenchen Tower Hotel Bravo Lima Uniform Kilo request flight following

say.note: Part B — regular Tower inbound call works normally
say.text: Grenchen Tower Hotel Bravo Lima Uniform Kilo inbound for landing
